---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the pain point this feature would fix.

## Describe the feature
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Why is it important to you?
How often do you face this problem? How many users might benefit?

## Alternatives you considered
Any other solutions you have tried or thought of.

## Additional context
Screenshots, links, or examples that help explain the idea.
